abilities.name: Damage Swap
abilities.text: As often as you like during your turn (before your attack), you may move 1 damage counter from 1 of your Pokémon to another as long as you don't Knock Out that Pokémon. This power can't be used if Alakazam is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Confuse Ray
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

source_payload.flavorText: Its brain can outperform a supercomputer. Its intelligence quotient is said to be 5000.
source_payload.name: Alakazam

abilities.name: Energy Burn
abilities.text: As often as you like during your turn (before your attack), you may turn all Energy attached to Charizard into Fire Energy for the rest of the turn. This power can't be used if Charizard is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Fire Spin
attacks.text: Discard 2 Energy cards attached to Charizard in order to use this attack.

source_payload.flavorText: Spits fire that is hot enough to melt boulders. Known to unintentionally cause forest fires.
source_payload.name: Charizard

attacks.name: Thunder Jolt
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, Pikachu does 10 damage to itself.

source_payload.flavorText: When several of these Pokémon gather, their electricity can cause lightning storms.
source_payload.name: Pikachu

abilities.name: Energy Trans
abilities.text: As often as you like during your turn (before your attack), you may take 1 Grass Energy card attached to 1 of your Pokémon and attach it to a different one. This power can't be used if Venusaur is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

source_payload.flavorText: This plant blooms when it is absorbing solar energy. It stays on the move to seek sunlight.
source_payload.name: Venusaur

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 20 more damage; if tails, this attack does 10 damage.

attacks.name: Flamethrower
attacks.text: Discard 1 Fire Energy card attached to Flareon in order to use this attack.

source_payload.flavorText: When storing thermal energy in its body, its temperature could soar to over 1600 degrees.
source_payload.name: Flareon

attacks.name: Swords Dance
attacks.text: During your next turn, Scyther's Slash attack's base damage is 60 instead of 30.

source_payload.flavorText: With ninja-like agility and speed, it can create the illusion that there is more than one of it.
source_payload.name: Scyther

attacks.name: Mass Explosion
attacks.text: Does 20 damage times the total number of Koffings, Weezings, and Dark Weezings in play (Apply Weakness and Resistance.). Then, this attack does 20 damage to each Koffing, Weezing, and Dark Weezing (even your own). Don't apply Weakness and Resistance.

attacks.name: Stun Gas
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned; if tails, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

source_payload.flavorText: Researchers have observed these Pokémon reproducing in industrial waste sites.
source_payload.name: Dark Weezing

attacks.name: Naptime
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, remove 3 damage counters from Sabrina's Slowbro and Sabrina's Slowbro is now Asleep. If Sabrina's Slowbro has fewer damage counters than that, remove all of them.

attacks.name: Screaming Headbutt
attacks.text: You can't use this attack during your next turn.

attacks.name: Fire Tail Slap
attacks.text: Use this attack only if there are any Fire Energy cards attached to Blaine's Charmander. Flip a coin. If tails, discard 1 of those cards.

source_payload.name: Whimsicott VSTAR
rules: VSTAR rule: When your Pokémon VSTAR is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

source_payload.name: Pikachu VMAX
rules: VMAX rule: When your Pokémon VMAX is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Scorching Heater
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, if this Pokémon is damaged by an attack (even if it is Knocked Out), put 6 damage counters on the Attacking Pokémon.

source_payload.flavorText: This Pokémon makes its home near volcanoes. At the end of the day, Magby soaks in magma, resting and recovering from the day's fatigue.
source_payload.name: Magby
Lt. Surge's Bargain
rules: Ask your opponent if each player may take a Prize card. If yes, each player takes a Prize card. If no, you draw 4 cards.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.
